props.name: itemLabel
props.description: Singular label for items (used in badge)

props.name: itemLabelPlural
props.description: Plural label for items (used in badge)

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Empty state message when folder contains no items

props.name: onDrop
props.type: (itemId: string, folderId: string, index?: number) => void

props.name: isDropTarget
props.description: Is this folder currently a valid drop target

props.name: isDropCompleted
props.description: Briefly set to true after a successful drop for micro-feedback

props.name: onDragEnter
props.description: Callback when drag enters folder (for syncing @dnd-kit state)

props.name: onDragLeaveFolder
props.description: Callback when drag leaves folder (for syncing @dnd-kit state)
